'''yazaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:raad|raad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raad|raad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yazaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzæzæth|yæzæzæth]] || [[word:yæzæzæj|yæzæzæj]] || [[word:yæzæzæsh|yæzæzæsh]] || [[word:yæzæzæ|yæzæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazazazath|yazazazath]] || [[word:yazazazaj|yazazazaj]] || [[word:yazazazash|yazazazash]] || [[word:yazazaza|yazazaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazazath|yazazath]] || [[word:yazazaj|yazazaj]] || [[word:yazazash|yazazash]] || [[word:yazaza|yazaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazafzath|yazafzath]] || [[word:yazafzaj|yazafzaj]] || [[word:yazafzash|yazafzash]] || [[word:yazafzaf|yazafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazazatha|yazazatha]] || [[word:yazazaja|yazazaja]] || [[word:yazazasha|yazazasha]] || [[word:yazazaka|yazazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazazath|yazazath]] || [[word:yazazaj|yazazaj]] || [[word:yazazash|yazazash]] || [[word:yazaza|yazaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazazathal|yazazathal]] || [[word:yazazajal|yazazajal]] || [[word:yazazashal|yazazashal]] || [[word:yazazakal|yazazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazazathatha|yazazathatha]] || [[word:yazazajaja|yazazajaja]] || [[word:yazazashasha|yazazashasha]] || [[word:yazazaka|yazazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazazathan|yazazathan]] || [[word:yazazajan|yazazajan]] || [[word:yazazashan|yazazashan]] || [[word:yazazakan|yazazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazazathaoro|yazazathaoro]] || [[word:yazazajaoro|yazazajaoro]] || [[word:yazazashaoro|yazazashaoro]] || [[word:yazazakaoro|yazazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
